assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with a table listing both 'trustify-backend' (serena_backend) and 'trustify-ui' (serena_ui) as entries
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 19-23 contain '## Repository Registry' with a table listing 'trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend' and 'trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 27-31 contain '## Jira Configuration' with all 5 fields: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 33-34: '## Code Intelligence' section exists and line 35 states: 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' with examples for both serena_backend and serena_ui.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 53: '### Limitations' appears as a subheading under the '## Code Intelligence' section (which starts at line 33).

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 5: 'Discovered 2 Serena instances from MCP tool listing:' followed by '1. **serena_backend**' (line 7) and '2. **serena_ui**' (line 8).

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all Project Configuration sections (Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Bug Configuration) were newly added — pre-existing non-configuration content from the CLAUDE.md (like the project heading and Documentation section) may appear as preserved, which is expected since only Project Configuration was missing
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md lines 11-12: 'All Project Configuration sections were newly added (no prior Project Configuration existed):' followed by listing all 4 sections: Repository Registry (line 14), Jira Configuration (line 15), Code Intelligence (line 16), Bug Configuration (line 17). Pre-existing content (project heading, Documentation, Getting Started) listed as preserved under 'Preserved Content' (lines 3-9).

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path — matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 20: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' — all four required columns are present in the correct order.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 57-61: '## Bug Configuration' section with 'Bug issue type ID: 10001', 'Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', 'Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks' — all three fields present with correct values.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers to enable security triage for the project (Step 9 opt-in prompt) and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md does not contain '## Security Configuration' anywhere in the file. discovery-log.md line 34 confirms: 'User declined to enable security triage. Security Configuration section not added.' changes-log.md line 23 confirms: 'Security Configuration — user declined to enable security triage; section omitted'.
